_rotation_note: The daily job picks the next business each morning - rotating among ward businesses with priority to spotlight requests from owners and newly opened spots. Keep yesterday's entries in history.

current.name: Green Street Smoked Meats
current.blurb: Tucked down an alley entrance in the heart of the West Loop, Green Street Smoked Meats serves Texas-style barbecue by the pound, brisket, ribs, and burnt ends, plus frozen drinks and cold beer at long communal tables. It's a Fulton Market-era classic that helped define the neighborhood's food scene.
